scripts.lint: pnpm exec eslint src tests vite.config.ts vite.env.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm exec eslint src tests vite.config.ts vite.env.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts --fix
scripts.format: pnpm exec prettier --write src tests package.json components.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.node.json vite.config.ts vite.env.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts index.html README.md
scripts.format:check: pnpm exec prettier --check src tests package.json components.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.node.json vite.config.ts vite.env.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts index.html README.md
